name: abp-sensei
description: Expert ABP Framework v10.4 (.NET 10) companion for Claude Code: 23 production-grounded skills, a specialized ABP architect subagent, and slash commands for entity scaffolding, code review, CRUD generation, and v10.4 upgrade audits. Covers DDD, EF Core/MongoDB, multi-tenancy, modularity, authorization, microservices, and more.
